texto: Theater isn't there to provide answers. Only possibilities. I just ask the questions. But I believe hope comes from the fact that there is a potential for redemption. At the core, that's what matters in the theater I'm attracted to. Do we dare to hope? Do we allow ourselves to hope?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Joe Mantello que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Theater isn't there to provide answers. Only possibilities. I just ask the questions. But I belie…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, believe, i-believe, com foco em i-believe.
